name: Capital Contributions
text: Each Partner shall contribute capital to the partnership in such amounts and at such times as agreed between the Partners and set out in Schedule A to this Deed. The capital contributions shall be held in the name of the partnership and shall not be withdrawn except in accordance with this Deed. Profits and losses of the partnership shall be shared among the Partners in the ratio as agreed and recorded herein, and each Partner acknowledges that the capital contribution constitutes lawful consideration for this Agreement within the meaning of Section 2(d) of the Indian Contract Act, 1872.
invalid_if: Capital contributions are not agreed upon in writing
No profit/loss sharing ratio is specified
title: Capital Contributions

jurisdiction_constraints.general: Partnership firms must be registered under Indian Partnership Act 1932 S.58 for right to sue third parties

dispute_hotspots: Profit/loss sharing ratio disputes — most litigated partnership issue
Goodwill on dissolution — valuation method not specified
Capital account vs current account — interest on capital under IPA 1932 S.13
Partnership Act 1932 S.13 — interest on capital at 6% p.a. only if agreed
